item.title: Picture Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Picture Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: professionaldata1
item.itunes:summary:
Picture Recovery
(Utilities)
Advance digital camera picture software easily rescue different file extension image without any prior technical knowledge. Valuable Picture Recovery application is develop to salvage damaged images, virus corrupted photographs and other missing or misplace picture within few mouse clicks from formatted hard disk drive. Unique digital photo recovery software offers user to manage restoration of badly damaged wedding, birthday, party picture quickly without any risk of further loss and save repaired images in new safe disk location for future usage. www.recoverymonster.com gives solution to restore different photo file format such as jpeg, gif, bmp etc and support different removable media brands like Sony, Canon, Panasonic, Kingston etc. Reliable digital Picture Recovery program is useful to restore memorable photographs which deleted due to power failure etc from various storage media. Genuine image restoration utility facilitates those user who lost or missed their cherish moments digital pictures from hard disk drive unfortunately. Extraordinary camera rescue application quickly retrieves erased picture files or folders from removable storage media without any interruption. Most intelligent photo recovery application gives opportunity to repair badly damaged digital picture by non technical user without interruption and data loss risk. Picture undelete utility helps user to retrieve inaccessible images from USB media within few mouse clicks. Features *Photo salvage application facilitates user to restore corrupted party albums from HDD within few seconds.*Picture Recovery software is reliable for almost every hard disk brands like Toshiba, Samsung, Hitachi, IBM etc. *Digital image rescue tool is design to undelete different file extension photos immediately.

[read more]
item.description:
Picture Recovery
(Utilities)
Advance digital camera picture software easily rescue different file extension image without any prior technical knowledge. Valuable Picture Recovery application is develop to salvage damaged images, virus corrupted photographs and other missing or misplace picture within few mouse clicks from formatted hard disk drive. Unique digital photo recovery software offers user to manage restoration of badly damaged wedding, birthday, party picture quickly without any risk of further loss and save repaired images in new safe disk location for future usage. www.recoverymonster.com gives solution to restore different photo file format such as jpeg, gif, bmp etc and support different removable media brands like Sony, Canon, Panasonic, Kingston etc. Reliable digital Picture Recovery program is useful to restore memorable photographs which deleted due to power failure etc from various storage media. Genuine image restoration utility facilitates those user who lost or missed their cherish moments digital pictures from hard disk drive unfortunately. Extraordinary camera rescue application quickly retrieves erased picture files or folders from removable storage media without any interruption. Most intelligent photo recovery application gives opportunity to repair badly damaged digital picture by non technical user without interruption and data loss risk. Picture undelete utility helps user to retrieve inaccessible images from USB media within few mouse clicks. Features *Photo salvage application facilitates user to restore corrupted party albums from HDD within few seconds.*Picture Recovery software is reliable for almost every hard disk brands like Toshiba, Samsung, Hitachi, IBM etc. *Digital image rescue tool is design to undelete different file extension photos immediately.

[read more]

Advance digital camera picture software easily rescue different file extension image without any prior technical knowledge. Unique digital photo recovery software offers user to manage restoration of badly damaged wedding, birthday, party picture quickly without any risk of further loss and save repaired images in new safe disk location for future usage. www.recoverymonster.com gives solution to restore different photo file format such as jpeg, gif, bmp etc and support different removable media brands like Sony, Canon, Panasonic, Kingston etc. Reliable digital Picture Recovery program is useful to restore memorable photographs which deleted due to power failure etc from various storage media. Genuine image restoration utility facilitates those user who lost or missed their cherish moments digital pictures from hard disk drive unfortunately. Extraordinary camera rescue application quickly retrieves erased picture files or folders from removable storage media without any interruption. Most intelligent photo recovery application gives opportunity to repair badly damaged digital picture by non technical user without interruption and data loss risk. Features *Photo salvage application facilitates user to restore corrupted party albums from HDD within few seconds.*Picture Recovery software is reliable for almost every hard disk brands like Toshiba, Samsung, Hitachi, IBM etc. *Digital image rescue tool is design to undelete different file extension photos immediately.

item.title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:author: wusel1007
item.itunes:summary:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

Repository for OpenSuSE - 15.5 / 15.6 / Tumbleweed:
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.5/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo"

Use: sudo zypper refresh && sudo zypper install ClamAV-GUI

For Ubuntu (UALinux repository): https://ualinux.com/en/ubuntu-apps-other/clamav-gui
How to add a repository: https://ualinux.com/en/how-to-connect

Added a Spec-File if anybody likes to create a RPM-Package for another Distro that uses RPM-Packages
Added Source Code for QT6 without using core5compat.
[read more]
item.description:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

Repository for OpenSuSE - 15.5 / 15.6 / Tumbleweed:
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.5/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo"

Use: sudo zypper refresh && sudo zypper install ClamAV-GUI

For Ubuntu (UALinux repository): https://ualinux.com/en/ubuntu-apps-other/clamav-gui
How to add a repository: https://ualinux.com/en/how-to-connect

Added a Spec-File if anybody likes to create a RPM-Package for another Distro that uses RPM-Packages
Added Source Code for QT6 without using core5compat.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

Repository for OpenSuSE - 15.5 / 15.6 / Tumbleweed:
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.5/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo"

Use: sudo zypper refresh && sudo zypper install ClamAV-GUI

For Ubuntu (UALinux repository): https://ualinux.com/en/ubuntu-apps-other/clamav-gui
How to add a repository: https://ualinux.com/en/how-to-connect

Added a Spec-File if anybody likes to create a RPM-Package for another Distro that uses RPM-Packages
Added Source Code for QT6 without using core5compat.
[read more]

item.title: FAT Partition File Recovery Software [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: FAT Partition File Recovery Software [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: professionaldata1
item.itunes:summary:
FAT Partition File Recovery Software
(Internet Apps)
Program to revive misplaced snapshots FAT Partition File Recovery Software is able to revive misplaced mp4 files. Powerful FAT Partition File Recovery Software provides comprehensive solution to rescue misplaced wallpapers saved in multiple graphical formats like jpg, gif, png, bmp etc within few minutes. Smart FAT data rescue utility supports different hard disk drive standards like HDD, SCSI, ATA, SATA etc to revive deleted files and folders.FAT Partition File Recovery Software is designed to rescue erased data items like songs, music files, documents, text files, video clips, audio clips from damaged SCSI drive.

[read more]

item.title: Small web browser webkit2gtk 4.1 written with A I [Browser]
item.itunes:title: Small web browser webkit2gtk 4.1 written with A I [Browser]
item.itunes:author: blue-dxca93
item.itunes:summary:
Small web browser webkit2gtk 4.1 written with A I
(Browser)
The use of this Software is at Users sole risk. Source code is readable and small. So expect it to be lwss functional than web.

gcc `pkg-config --cflags gtk+-3.0 webkit2gtk-4.1` -o claude-browser2b claude-browser-2f.c `pkg-config --libs gtk+-3.0 webkit2gtk-4.1`

[read more]

item.title: Android Recovery Software [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Android Recovery Software [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: professionaldata1
item.itunes:summary:
Android Recovery Software
(Internet Apps)
Best featured file rescue tool for android. Undelete mistakenly lost mp3/mp4 music files using Android Recovery Software. Highly interactive Android Recovery Software does not require any special technical knowledge or expert guidance to operate it for quick salvage of intentionally deleted data from formatted storage devices. Well featured Android Recovery Software is fully capable to recover important video clip that is removed from android mobiles because of various error reasons like human mistake, accidental pressing of delete button, virus attack etc. Best featured data retrieval tool for android recovers removed images without modifying picture original structure.Download comprehensive files revival tool for android that enables users to rescue missing memorable picture collection from virus infected device in less time. Simple to operate Android Recovery Software enables users to undelete entire data that is erased due to virus attack on storage media. Professionally designed file salvage utility for android device keeps safe retrieved video clipping at user defined location on computer system.

[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

item.title: Qtractor [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: Qtractor [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
Qtractor
(Music Production)
Qtractor is an audio/MIDI multi-track sequencer application written in C++ with the Qt framework. Target platform is Linux, where the Jack Audio Connection Kit (JACK) for audio and the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) for MIDI are the main infrastructures to evolve as a fairly-featured Linux desktop audio workstation GUI, specially dedicated to the personal home-studio.
Features:

- Multi-track audio and MIDI sequencing and recording.
- Developed on the Qt C++ application and UI framework.
- Uses JACK for audio and ALSA sequencer for MIDI as multimedia infrastructures.
- Traditional multi-track tape recorder control paradigm.
- Audio file formats support: OGG (via libvorbis), MP3 (via libmad, playback only), WAV, FLAC, AIFF and many, many more (via libsndfile).
- Standard MIDI files support (format 0 and 1).
- Non-destructive, non-linear editing.
- Unlimited number of tracks per session/project.
- Unlimited number of overlapping clips per track.
- XML encoded session/project description files (SDI).
- Point-and-click, multi-select, drag-and-drop interaction (drag, move, drop, cut, copy, paste, paste-repeat, delete, split, merge).
- Unlimited undo/redo.
- Built-in mixer and monitor controls.
- Built-in connection patchbay control and persistence (a-la QjackCtl).
- LADSPA, DSSI, native VST(2), VST3, CLAP and LV2 plug-ins support.
- Unlimited number of plug-ins per track or bus.
- Plug-in presets, programs and chunk/configurations support, including native VST FXB/FXP file support.
- Unlimited audio/MIDI effect send/return inserts per track or bus.
- Loop-recording/takes.
- Audio/MIDI clip fade-in/out, cross-fade (linear, quadratic, cubic).
- Audio/MIDI clip gain/volume, normalize, export.
- Audio/MIDI track and plugin parameter automation (dynamic curves, sample&hold, linear and spline modes).
- Audio clip time-stretching (WSOLA-like or via librubberband),
pitch-shifting (via librubberband) and seamless sample-rate conversion (via libsamplerate).
- Audio/MIDI track export (mix-down, render, merge, freeze).
- Audio/MIDI metronome bar/beat clicks.
- Unlimited tempo/time-signature map.
- Unlimited location/bar markers.
- MIDI clip editor (matrix/piano roll).
- MIDI instrument definitions (a-la Cakewalk(tm) (*.ins)); SoundFont (*.sf2) and MIDI Names XML (*.midnam) files also supported.
- MIDI controller mapping/learn/assignment (mixer and plug-in parameters).
- MIDI system exclusive (SysEx) setups.
- JACK transport sync master/slave.
- JACK session support.
- NSM (Non/New Session Management) support.
- MMC control surface enabled.
- MIDI Clock, Song Position Pointer (SPP) support.
- Configurable PC-keyboard and MIDI controller shortcuts.
[read more]
item.description:
Qtractor
(Music Production)
Qtractor is an audio/MIDI multi-track sequencer application written in C++ with the Qt framework. Target platform is Linux, where the Jack Audio Connection Kit (JACK) for audio and the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) for MIDI are the main infrastructures to evolve as a fairly-featured Linux desktop audio workstation GUI, specially dedicated to the personal home-studio.
Features:

- Multi-track audio and MIDI sequencing and recording.
- Developed on the Qt C++ application and UI framework.
- Uses JACK for audio and ALSA sequencer for MIDI as multimedia infrastructures.
- Traditional multi-track tape recorder control paradigm.
- Audio file formats support: OGG (via libvorbis), MP3 (via libmad, playback only), WAV, FLAC, AIFF and many, many more (via libsndfile).
- Standard MIDI files support (format 0 and 1).
- Non-destructive, non-linear editing.
- Unlimited number of tracks per session/project.
- Unlimited number of overlapping clips per track.
- XML encoded session/project description files (SDI).
- Point-and-click, multi-select, drag-and-drop interaction (drag, move, drop, cut, copy, paste, paste-repeat, delete, split, merge).
- Unlimited undo/redo.
- Built-in mixer and monitor controls.
- Built-in connection patchbay control and persistence (a-la QjackCtl).
- LADSPA, DSSI, native VST(2), VST3, CLAP and LV2 plug-ins support.
- Unlimited number of plug-ins per track or bus.
- Plug-in presets, programs and chunk/configurations support, including native VST FXB/FXP file support.
- Unlimited audio/MIDI effect send/return inserts per track or bus.
- Loop-recording/takes.
- Audio/MIDI clip fade-in/out, cross-fade (linear, quadratic, cubic).
- Audio/MIDI clip gain/volume, normalize, export.
- Audio/MIDI track and plugin parameter automation (dynamic curves, sample&hold, linear and spline modes).
- Audio clip time-stretching (WSOLA-like or via librubberband),
pitch-shifting (via librubberband) and seamless sample-rate conversion (via libsamplerate).
- Audio/MIDI track export (mix-down, render, merge, freeze).
- Audio/MIDI metronome bar/beat clicks.
- Unlimited tempo/time-signature map.
- Unlimited location/bar markers.
- MIDI clip editor (matrix/piano roll).
- MIDI instrument definitions (a-la Cakewalk(tm) (*.ins)); SoundFont (*.sf2) and MIDI Names XML (*.midnam) files also supported.
- MIDI controller mapping/learn/assignment (mixer and plug-in parameters).
- MIDI system exclusive (SysEx) setups.
- JACK transport sync master/slave.
- JACK session support.
- NSM (Non/New Session Management) support.
- MMC control surface enabled.
- MIDI Clock, Song Position Pointer (SPP) support.
- Configurable PC-keyboard and MIDI controller shortcuts.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qtractor
(Music Production)
Qtractor is an audio/MIDI multi-track sequencer application written in C++ with the Qt framework. Target platform is Linux, where the Jack Audio Connection Kit (JACK) for audio and the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) for MIDI are the main infrastructures to evolve as a fairly-featured Linux desktop audio workstation GUI, specially dedicated to the personal home-studio.
Features:

- Multi-track audio and MIDI sequencing and recording.
- Developed on the Qt C++ application and UI framework.
- Uses JACK for audio and ALSA sequencer for MIDI as multimedia infrastructures.
- Traditional multi-track tape recorder control paradigm.
- Audio file formats support: OGG (via libvorbis), MP3 (via libmad, playback only), WAV, FLAC, AIFF and many, many more (via libsndfile).
- Standard MIDI files support (format 0 and 1).
- Non-destructive, non-linear editing.
- Unlimited number of tracks per session/project.
- Unlimited number of overlapping clips per track.
- XML encoded session/project description files (SDI).
- Point-and-click, multi-select, drag-and-drop interaction (drag, move, drop, cut, copy, paste, paste-repeat, delete, split, merge).
- Unlimited undo/redo.
- Built-in mixer and monitor controls.
- Built-in connection patchbay control and persistence (a-la QjackCtl).
- LADSPA, DSSI, native VST(2), VST3, CLAP and LV2 plug-ins support.
- Unlimited number of plug-ins per track or bus.
- Plug-in presets, programs and chunk/configurations support, including native VST FXB/FXP file support.
- Unlimited audio/MIDI effect send/return inserts per track or bus.
- Loop-recording/takes.
- Audio/MIDI clip fade-in/out, cross-fade (linear, quadratic, cubic).
- Audio/MIDI clip gain/volume, normalize, export.
- Audio/MIDI track and plugin parameter automation (dynamic curves, sample&hold, linear and spline modes).
- Audio clip time-stretching (WSOLA-like or via librubberband),
pitch-shifting (via librubberband) and seamless sample-rate conversion (via libsamplerate).
- Audio/MIDI track export (mix-down, render, merge, freeze).
- Audio/MIDI metronome bar/beat clicks.
- Unlimited tempo/time-signature map.
- Unlimited location/bar markers.
- MIDI clip editor (matrix/piano roll).
- MIDI instrument definitions (a-la Cakewalk(tm) (*.ins)); SoundFont (*.sf2) and MIDI Names XML (*.midnam) files also supported.
- MIDI controller mapping/learn/assignment (mixer and plug-in parameters).
- MIDI system exclusive (SysEx) setups.
- JACK transport sync master/slave.
- JACK session support.
- NSM (Non/New Session Management) support.
- MMC control surface enabled.
- MIDI Clock, Song Position Pointer (SPP) support.
- Configurable PC-keyboard and MIDI controller shortcuts.
[read more]

item.title: QjackCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: QjackCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
QjackCtl
(Music Production)
QjackCtl is a simple Qt application to control the JACK sound server daemon, specific for the Linux Audio Desktop infrastructure.
Written in C++ around the Qt framework for X11, most exclusively using Qt Designer.

Provides a simple GUI dialog for setting several JACK daemon parameters, which are properly saved between sessions, and a way control of the status of the audio server daemon. With time, this primordial interface has become richer by including a enhanced patchbay and connection control features.
[read more]
item.description:
QjackCtl
(Music Production)
QjackCtl is a simple Qt application to control the JACK sound server daemon, specific for the Linux Audio Desktop infrastructure.
Written in C++ around the Qt framework for X11, most exclusively using Qt Designer.

Provides a simple GUI dialog for setting several JACK daemon parameters, which are properly saved between sessions, and a way control of the status of the audio server daemon. With time, this primordial interface has become richer by including a enhanced patchbay and connection control features.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
QjackCtl
(Music Production)
QjackCtl is a simple Qt application to control the JACK sound server daemon, specific for the Linux Audio Desktop infrastructure.
Written in C++ around the Qt framework for X11, most exclusively using Qt Designer.

Provides a simple GUI dialog for setting several JACK daemon parameters, which are properly saved between sessions, and a way control of the status of the audio server daemon. With time, this primordial interface has become richer by including a enhanced patchbay and connection control features.
[read more]
